recommendations.title: Random Acts of Violence
recommendations.overview: A pair of comic book writers begin to notice scary similarities between the character they created and horrific real-life events.

recommendations.title: Here Alone
recommendations.overview: A woman struggles to survive on her own in the wake of a mysterious epidemic, which has decimated society and forced her deep into the unforgiving wild.

recommendations.title: Goon: Last of the Enforcers
recommendations.overview: During a pro lockout, Doug "The Thug" Glatt is injured and must choose whether to defend his team against a dangerous new enemy, or be there for his wife as she prepares to give birth to his daughter.

recommendations.title: Coherence
recommendations.overview: Four couples gather for dinner the night a mysterious and powerful comet passes overhead.

recommendations.title: Cargo
recommendations.overview: After being infected in the wake of a violent pandemic and with only 48 hours to live, a father struggles to find a new home for his baby daughter.

recommendations.title: Invasion of the Body Snatchers
recommendations.overview: A small-town doctor learns that the population of his community is being replaced by emotionless alien duplicates.

recommendations.title: Plan 75
recommendations.overview: In a Japan of the near future, the government program Plan 75 encourages senior citizens to be voluntarily euthanized to remedy a super-aged society. An elderly woman whose means of survival are vanishing, a pragmatic Plan 75 salesman, and a young Fi

recommendations.title: Dark Light
recommendations.overview: A woman returns to her family home and discovers it to be inhabited by monsters.

recommendations.title: Two
recommendations.overview: Two people, a man and a woman, wake up naked and with their abdomens attached to each other.

recommendations.title: Pod
recommendations.overview: A family intervention goes horrifically awry within the snowy confines of an isolated lake house.
